overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a shirtless character with green mohawk, facial tattoos, and cybernetic arm implants walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The character traverses a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, crosses a busy intersection with moderate traffic, then turns around and walks back toward the camera while holding a drink.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with homeless encampment debris

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing cardboard boxes and makeshift shelters

notable_agents.action: shirtless character with green hair walking ahead of ego

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with metal support beams creating partial cover overhead
stacked cardboard boxes and wooden pallets indicating temporary shelter area
large digital advertisement screen with bright neon graphics on building facade
thick structural support column for the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure. The area is semi-covered with scattered cardboard boxes and trash bags indicating homeless encampments. Neon billboards and advertisements are visible in the distance on surrounding glass buildings. Other pedestrians walk in scattered directions, and sparse vehicle traffic moves on the street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks

events.description: ego stops at red traffic light waiting to cross the street with other pedestrians
traffic light changes and ego crosses the intersection with moderate vehicle traffic passing by

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk with two other characters, then crossing the busy intersection while cars pass on the left

notable_agents.action: character with red mohawk and white tank top waiting and crossing alongside ego

entered.detail: suspended traffic signal showing red light above the crosswalk
zebra-striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
large building facade with prominent 'DELAMAIN' signage and art deco styling
tall palm trees lining the median of the wide street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with full sky exposure. The character stops at a red traffic light, waiting alongside other pedestrians including one with a distinctive red mohawk. After the light changes, the character crosses the zebra-striped crosswalk while moderate traffic flows past. The Delamain building with its prominent signage dominates the left side of the view, and palm trees line the street median.

scene_state.functional_zone: return walk along covered sidewalk facing oncoming pedestrian traffic

events.description: character turns around to walk back toward the camera, now facing forward while holding a purple drink

agents.ego_description: walking back toward the camera while holding a drink, revealing chest tattoo reading 'Hustle' and cybernetic arm implants

notable_agents.action: small child in yellow jacket walking past ego on the left side

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers lining the edge of the walkway
large blue and white garbage bags piled against the overpass wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns around and walks back toward the camera, revealing detailed cybernetic implants on the arms and a 'Hustle' tattoo across the chest. The path returns to the semi-covered area beneath the elevated highway, with concrete barriers and trash bags visible on the right. The character holds a purple drink while walking, and sparse pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction. The lighting shifts as the character moves through dappled shadows cast by the overpass structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that leads a character from a gritty, sheltered underpass into a bright urban intersection before returning to the shadows of the highway. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated structure, passing through homeless encampments marked by scattered cardboard and trash bags. As the path opens into a wide intersection, the environment shifts to full sky exposure where the character waits at a red light before crossing a zebra-striped street lined with palm trees and the prominent Delamain building. The scene then reverses direction as the character turns to walk back toward the camera, revealing detailed cybernetic arm implants and a chest tattoo while holding a purple drink. Finally, the lighting shifts back into dappled shadows as the camera retreats into the semi-covered area beneath the overpass, passing concrete barriers and sparse pedestrians.
